title: Add end-to-end weekly SEO review runner
summary: Records release evidence for the one-shot weekly SEO review runner, additional 28-day fixtures, and the end-to-end test that now executes both GSC imports plus priority report generation in one command.
completed_todo_items: Review impressions, CTR, ranking movement, and indexed pages at the end of each week.

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the weekly runner can update a tracker from 7-day and 28-day exports and produce the markdown priority report in one end-to-end command.

ops.rollback_plan: Delete the weekly runner, 28-day fixtures, test, and playbook references if the SEO review process is reworked into a different ingestion and reporting flow.
